name: Catfish and Shrimp Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large soup pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add onion and garlic; sauté until onions are transparent.
3. Stir in tomatoes, tomato paste, and bay leaf.
4. Cover and simmer for 25 minutes.
5. Add water, white wine, and clam juice. Simmer uncovered for 45 minutes.
6. Add shrimp and catfish cubes, salt, and pepper. Cook for an additional 10 minutes, or until the catfish flakes easily.
7. Remove the bay leaf. Serve with chopped coriander and lemon slices on top of each serving.
8. Serves 8 people.
Serve with fresh salad and French bread.
